techniques.evidence_quote: unauthorized access to its computer systems between January 27, 2025, and February 6, 2025
The review of the compromised files confirmed that they contained a range of data
unauthorized access to its computer systems between January 27, 2025, and February 6, 2025
it has confirmed that there was data exfiltration
this appears to be a ransomware attack
All computer systems were powered down to prevent further unauthorized access

attack_chain.description: Attacker gained unauthorized access to Episource's AWS/computer environment on or around January 27, 2025. The specific initial access vector was not disclosed, but an external intrusion into a cloud-hosted healthcare system is implied.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: unauthorized access to its computer systems between January 27, 2025, and February 6, 2025

attack_chain.description: Attacker traversed the compromised environment to locate sensitive healthcare and personal data files across Episource's systems during the ~10-day dwell period.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: The review of the compromised files confirmed that they contained a range of data, which varied from individual to individual

attack_chain.description: Attacker accessed and staged healthcare records, PHI, and personal information stored in Episource's cloud environment, affecting data belonging to 5.4 million individuals.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Health information: diagnosis information, treatment information, prescriptions, test results, medical images, medical record numbers

attack_chain.description: Attacker exfiltrated the collected healthcare records and personal data from Episource's environment prior to deploying ransomware, consistent with a double-extortion ransomware pattern.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: it has confirmed that there was data exfiltration

attack_chain.description: Attacker deployed ransomware against Episource's systems, encrypting data and prompting the organization to power down all computer systems to contain the attack.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: this appears to be a ransomware attack. The group responsible is currently unknown

initial_access_vector: Unauthorized access to Episource's AWS/cloud environment; specific vector (e.g., phishing, credential compromise, exploit) not disclosed in available sources
persistence_mechanism: Not disclosed; attacker maintained access for approximately 10 days (January 27 – February 6, 2025)
